name: plugin install dry-run prints planned copy actions without modifying the _community folder
command: mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example/generated-code-quality-standards/example-namespace && printf 'name: example\nrules: [{id: foo, detector: x}]\n' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass --dry-run 2>out.txt && [ ! -d generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example ] && grep -q 'planned: copy generated-code-quality-standards/example-namespace' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
